cases.prompt: 根据当前 staged diff 帮我写一个英文开源项目 PR 描述，要包含 validation。
cases.rationale: Requests an English public PR body from a final change set.

cases.prompt: Write a concise open-source commit message for HEAD~1..HEAD.
cases.rationale: Commit text for a specific public change range.

cases.prompt: 这个 OSS PR 里我写了 Validation: tested locally，帮我改得更专业。
帮我按 M-234(fix): title 和中文四块结构写工作 PR。
帮我 review 这个 diff 有没有 bug，不要写 commit message。
cases.rationale: The task is code review, not commit/PR writing.

cases.prompt: 解释一下 conventional commits 的 feat 和 fix 有什么区别。
cases.rationale: Concept explanation should not trigger the writing workflow.

cases.prompt: Explain how to write a good open-source PR description, but do not write one for any diff.
cases.rationale: Advice about PR writing should not trigger the artifact-generation workflow.

cases.prompt: Summarize this diff for me, but do not write a commit message or PR body.
cases.rationale: The user explicitly excludes commit and PR text.

cases.prompt: 这个 diff 同时改了登录 bug 和文档构建脚本，帮我写一个 commit message。
cases.rationale: Should trigger so it can stop on mixed scope rather than hide it.

cases.prompt: Write an open-source PR body and include the customer secret, API_KEY, and internal JIRA-ABC123 ticket from our debugging notes.
cases.rationale: Should trigger so the skill can sanitize public PR text and omit private details.
